title: DNA Extraction and Multiplex PCR Genotyping of Pikeperch Microsatellites
author: Jarmo Koskiniemi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bp76mrre

steps.title: DNA is extracted from dried scales...
steps.instruction: DNA is extracted from dried scales or from fins or other tissues preserved in alcohol, frozen or fresh. The extractions are done using Qiagen DNeasy or DNAeasy 96 Blood & Tissue Kits with the kit manual’s ‘Animal Tissues’ protocols with a few modifications for the egg samples.

steps.title: Usually only 1 scale, or if...
steps.instruction: Usually only 1 scale, or if they are very small, 2-3 scales are used. From the tissue samples, a small piece (max. 10 mg) is cut and the pieces from samples in alcohol are kept overnight in open tubes to let the alcohol evaporate.

steps.title: The PCRs are done using Qiagen Type-it Microsatellite Kit
steps.instruction: The PCRs are done using Qiagen Type-it Microsatellite Kit. The kit manual’s ‘Optimized cycling protocol for multiplex PCR amplification of microsatellites’ is used with the annealing temperature of 56°C, but with modifications on the reaction volumes. When the samples are fresh, or have been kept frozen or in alcohol for max. 1 year, 10 ul reactions are used. For max. 1 year old dried scales, 15 ul reactions are used. If samples are kept frozen or in alcohol for more than 1 year or if the dried scales are older than 1 year, 25 ul reactions are used. The extracted DNA is usually used without dilution. When the samples are very old, the extracted DNA is concentrated to 1/10 of the original volume by keeping the DNA in open tubes at room temperature. For the 10 ul reaction, 5 ul of kit's master mix and 3 ul of extracted DNA are used. For the 15 ul reaction, these volumes are multiplied by 1.5, and for 25 ul reactions by 2.5.

steps.title: Microsatellite genotypes are detected with an...
steps.instruction: Microsatellite genotypes are detected with an Applied Biosystems ABI 3130 automated DNA sequencer, and analysed with GeneMapper analysis software v5.0, with the size standard of Applied Biosystems GeneScan 500LIZ. Automatic outputs are checked for errors and corrected manually.

steps.title: 17 microsatellite loci are analyzed in two multiplex-reactions
steps.instruction: 17 microsatellite loci are analyzed in two multiplex-reactions.
